title: WELD: The Sovereign City
tagline: One screen to watch and govern an entire autonomous civilization — governance votes, permanent ledger, sealed orders, custody, reputation, and live relay all verified in browser with no backend.
holy_shit: The democratic market's trustless ECDSA-ballot governance and mirror-surviving permanent ledger now run inside the command-center's operator console — governance outcomes, ledger head, and relay proofs all show as live hash-verified tiles on one tab, with no admin, no server, and nothing to shut down.
powered_by: The Democratic Market's trustless governance + mirror-surviving permanent ledger fused with The Command Center's verified operator console + sovereign relay pipeline.
weld: Transplant the democratic market's full ECDSA-ballot governance, mirror-verified cell resolution, and permanently-ledgered economy intact as the inner core; transplant the command-center's console tiles, verified external feeds, and sovereign relay intact as the outer layer; bind them so the governance-ratified permanent ledger entry becomes the relay genesis frame — one tab governs and operates an autonomous civilization.
agent_scenario: When you need a single no-backend operator console that both governs and operates a trustless economy — where ECDSA-ballot consensus ratifies every order, a permanent mirror-surviving ledger records each verdict, and a tamper-refusing relay carries the governed history through hash-verified hops.
author: kody-w + Copilot
